---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a contribution to Santana
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed (if applicable).

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -x` — all existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added for the change
- [ ] Manual testing (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, ARCHITECTURE, etc.) if needed
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have removed all API keys, tokens, and secrets from logs and commits

## Additional context

Add any other context about the PR here. Screenshots, logs, etc.
